## Summary

- Describe the core change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit format used for commits
- [ ] Branch naming follows strategy (`feature/*`, `fix/*`, `hotfix/*`, `release/*`)
- [ ] Logging and config changes documented when applicable
